items.title: Identity verification on Claude
items.pt: A Anthropic, criadora do modelo de linguagem grande Claude, começou a implementar uma verificação de identidade para usuários, uma medida que visa aumentar a segurança e a responsabilidade. Embora a necessidade de verificar a identidade de usuários de IA possa parecer um passo para a regulamentação, é uma abordagem importante para mitigar potenciais abusos e garantir que os avanços em inteligência artificial sejam usados de forma ética.
items.en: Anthropic, the creator of the large language model Claude, has begun implementing identity verification for users, a move aimed at enhancing security and accountability. While the necessity of verifying AI user identities might seem like a step towards regulation, it is a significant approach to mitigating potential misuse and ensuring advancements in artificial intelligence are used ethically.

items.title: zai-org/GLM-5.2
items.pt: A Hugging Face agora hospeda o GLM-5.2, um modelo de linguagem grande (LLM) notável por sua capacidade de geração de texto. Com mais de 57.000 downloads, este modelo, desenvolvido pela zai-org, demonstra o avanço contínuo em inteligência artificial, oferecendo uma ferramenta poderosa para desenvolvedores e pesquisadores explorarem e criarem novas aplicações.
items.en: Hugging Face now hosts GLM-5.2, a large language model (LLM) notable for its text generation capabilities. With over 57,000 downloads, this model, developed by zai-org, showcases ongoing advancements in artificial intelligence, providing a powerful tool for developers and researchers to explore and build new applications.

items.title: Pointeur : colombiaproject.click
items.pt:
Si vous vous renseignez sur colombiaproject.click, la ressource liée ci-dessous nous a été utile dans notre travail.

Dès que colombiaproject.click revient dans une discussion, on finit par envoyer le même lien. Il n'est pas parfait mais couvre les parties que la plupart des panoramas évitent : contraintes, pièges et quelques exemples détaillés.

En savoir plus : ce site.

items.title: DiffusionBench: On Holistic Evaluation of Diffusion Transformers
items.pt: Diffusion transformer (DiT) research on image generation has converged to a single evaluation setup: class-conditional generation on ImageNet. While methods improve the FID and related metrics, it is increasingly unclear whether they reflect real progress in generative modeling. The natural alternative, i.e., text-to-image (T2I) generation, is perceived as too costly or inconvenient to train and evaluate and is often skipped. We argue that this perception no longer holds. We introduce NanoGen, a
items.en: Diffusion transformer (DiT) research on image generation has converged to a single evaluation setup: class-conditional generation on ImageNet. While methods improve the FID and related metrics, it is increasingly unclear whether they reflect real progress in generative modeling. The natural alternative, i.e., text-to-image (T2I) generation, is perceived as too costly or inconvenient to train and evaluate and is often skipped. We argue that this perception no longer holds. items.title: BenchX: Benchmarking AI Models for Cancer Detection and Localization with Demographic and Protocol Biases
items.pt: Pesquisadores desenvolveram o BenchX, um benchmark de IA em larga escala com 85.355 exames de tomografia computadorizada, para avaliar 12 modelos de detecção de câncer. O estudo quantifica inconsistências de desempenho causadas por variações em demografia de pacientes e protocolos de imagem, um problema crítico para a aplicação clínica da IA. A análise, facilitada por modelos de linguagem grandes (LLMs) para extrair dados de subgrupos, visa garantir que a IA médica seja confiável em cenários do mundo real.
items.en: Researchers have developed BenchX, a large-scale AI benchmark featuring 85,355 CT scans, to evaluate 12 cancer detection models. The study quantifies performance inconsistencies arising from variations in patient demographics and imaging protocols, a critical issue for AI's real-world clinical deployment. This analysis, aided by large language models (LLMs) for extracting subgroup data, aims to ensure medical AI is reliable across diverse clinical settings.

items.title: FLAT: Feedforward Latent Triangle Splatting for Geometrically Accurate Scene Generation
items.pt: Generating explorable 3D scenes from a single image requires strong generative priors and accurate geometric representations suitable for downstream use. Current video diffusion models offer high-quality generation and implicitly encode multi-view geometric structure in latent space. However, existing feedforward latent scene decoders typically output volumetric 3D Gaussians that lack a well-defined surface, limiting their use in simulation or standard graphics pipelines. This motivates decoding
